zh.Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘
zh.Merriott, Somersetshire, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特梅利特
zh.Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France: 法國阿奎泰道多卡拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Meriet I於從1322年到1328年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親George de Meriet28歲，母親Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton34歲。他於1345年與Eleanor de Beauchamp在英國薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年10月2日在法國阿奎泰道多卡拉斯。

zh-hans.Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Meriet I于从1322年到1328年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲George de Meriet28岁，母亲Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton34岁。他于1345年与Eleanor de Beauchamp在英国薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年10月2日在法国阿奎泰道多卡拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meriet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: derivative of merle ‘blackbird’ (see Merle ). Compare Marlette .

History: Gédéon Merlet/Marlet from Roussy-le-Village in Moselle, France, married Margriet Martijn in Leiden, the Netherlands, in 1644, died in Piscataway, NJ, c. 1682. In 1662 they emigrated to the Dutch colony of New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY). Gédéon's name is listed (as Gidéon Merlet) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Marlette
meanings: Americanized form of French Marlet or of its variant Merlet . Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Malott , Malotte , Marlatt , Marlett , Mellott , and Melott .

History: Gédéon Merlet/Marlet from Roussy-le-Village in Moselle, France, married Margriet Martijn in Leiden, the Netherlands, in 1644, died in Piscataway, NJ, c. 1682. In 1662 they emigrated to the Dutch colony of New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY). Gédéon's name is listed (as Gidéon Merlet) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Merle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Etienne, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French, English (of Norman origin), German, and Dutch: nickname, possibly for a good or habitual singer or whistler, from Old French, Middle High German merle ‘blackbird’ (from Latin merula). See also Italian and Spanish Merlo .
French: habitational name from (Le) Merle, the name of several places in various parts of France.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Meriet I was born from 1322 to 1328, in Somerset, England, his father, George de Meriet, was 28 and his mother, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, was 34. He married Eleanor de Beauchamp in 1345, in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 2 October 1369, in Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Meriet I est né du 1322 au 1328, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, George de Meriet, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Beauchamp en 1345, à Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 1369, à Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Meriet I von 1322 bis 1328 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George de Meriet 28 und seine Mutter Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton 34. Er hat 1345 in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England Eleanor de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Oktober 1369 in Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Meriet I è nato il da 1322 a 1328 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, George de Meriet, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Beauchamp nel 1345, nel Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 ottobre 1369, nel Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Meriet Iがから1322年まで1328年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父George de Merietは28歳，母Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirktonは34歳であった。1345年にイギリスソメルセトハトチ ビーウチャンップでEleanor de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年10月2日にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンカレイスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Meriet I(이)가 1322년 부터 1328년 까지 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George de Meriet(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1345년 영국 서머세트 해트치 보챔프에서 Eleanor de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 10월 2일 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 캘레이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Meriet I nasceu de 1322 a 1328, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, George de Meriet, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Beauchamp em 1345, em Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1369, em Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Meriet I родился с 1322 по 1328 в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени George de Meriet было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Beauchamp в 1345 г. в местности хач бочамп, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 октября 1369 г. в местности калеи, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Meriet I nació desde 1322 hasta 1328, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, George de Meriet, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Beauchamp en 1345, en Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de octubre de 1369, en Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia.
